message:
Enhance HTTP/2 and server connection handling for improved stream management

- HTTP/2 connection: Add stream lifecycle hooks for cleaner state transitions,
  improve error propagation from stream processing failures
- HTTP/2 stream: Implement flow control window tracking, add DATA frame
  backpressure signaling, extend stream state machine with half-closed states
- Server connection: Refactor connection loop to use unified event dispatch,
  reduce allocation in hot path by reusing buffers
- Server shutdown: Add graceful drain phase with configurable timeout,
  implement connection-level GOAWAY propagation for HTTP/2

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
